_metadata.note: Global system tables shared by all domains. Domain canonical models must reference this file and must not redefine these tables.

changelog.1.1: Added ARCHIVE_LINEAGE (ZIP lineage, Section 7.3). Added JOB_SUMMARY (job output, Section 12.1). Added Archive_Lineage_ID FK to COLUMN_LINEAGE.

RECORD_EXCEPTIONS.description: Every individual record-level DQ failure. One row per failed check per source record. Produced by the DQ engine — not mapped from source columns. Present in every domain.

Exception_ID.description: Unique exception record identifier. Auto-generated by pipeline.

Job_ID.description: Ingestion job that produced this exception.

Domain.description: Domain config used for this job. e.g. trade, company_registration.

Source_Row_Index.description: Row number in source file. Row 1 = first data row after header. Used to locate the failing record in the original file.

Source_Column_Name.description: Source column name exactly as it appeared in the file header.

Canonical_Table.description: Canonical table the failing column was mapped to.

Canonical_Column.description: Canonical column the failing column was mapped to.

Raw_Value.description: Exact value from the source file that caused the exception. Stored as string regardless of declared type.

Exception_Type.description: Exception class for record-level failures. See allowed_values for full taxonomy.

Reason.description: Human-readable explanation. e.g. 'Invoice_Amount is mandatory and is null in this record'.

Insert_Timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when this exception record was written.

COLUMN_LINEAGE.description: Column-level mapping audit trail. One row per source column per job. Records every mapping decision: method, confidence, LLM reasoning. Joined to canonical records via Mapping_Reference_ID. Present in every domain.

Lineage_ID.description: Unique identifier for this lineage row.

Mapping_Reference_ID.description: Groups all column mappings for one job. FK referenced by canonical table lineage_columns.

Job_ID.description: Ingestion job that produced this mapping.

Source_Column_Name.description: Exact column name from source file header before any normalisation.

Source_Column_Normalised.description: Column name after normalisation: lowercase, underscores, specials stripped.

Canonical_Table.description: Canonical table mapped to. NULL if UNMAPPED.

Canonical_Column.description: Canonical column mapped to. 'UNMAPPED' if no match found.

Confidence_Score.description: 0–100. EXACT LOOKUP and USER OVERRIDE = 100. Fuzzy max ~91. LLM is self-reported.

Was_Mandatory.description: Whether mapped canonical column is mandatory.

Met_Threshold.description: Whether confidence met the configured mandatory threshold.

LLM_Reasoning.description: One-sentence LLM reasoning. NULL for non-LLM matches.

Lookup_Variant_Matched.description: For EXACT LOOKUP: the lookup_table.csv entry that matched. NULL for others.

Archive_Lineage_ID.description: FK to ARCHIVE_LINEAGE.Archive_Lineage_ID if source file came from a ZIP archive. NULL for direct uploads.

Insert_Timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when lineage row was written.

ARCHIVE_LINEAGE.description: Tracks each file extracted from a ZIP or nested ZIP archive. One row per extracted entry per job. Provides full archive provenance for column lineage and exceptions.

Archive_Lineage_ID.description: Unique identifier for this archive extraction record.

Job_ID.description: Ingestion job that produced this extraction.

Parent_Archive.description: Filename of the ZIP that directly contained this entry. NULL for top-level direct upload.

Archive_Entry_Name.description: The internal path of this entry within its parent ZIP.

Extracted_Path.description: Full resolved extraction path on disk (after zip-slip normalisation).

Nested_Level.description: Depth of nesting. 0 = direct upload, 1 = top-level ZIP, 2 = nested ZIP, etc.

File_Size_Bytes.description: Size of extracted file in bytes.

Insert_Timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when this archive lineage row was written.

JOB_SUMMARY.description: One row per ingestion job. High-level processing outcome: file counts, record counts, mapping scores, exception counts.

Files_Failed.description: Number of files that could not be parsed.

Total_Source_Rows.description: Total input rows across all parsed files.

Total_Canonical_Rows_Written.description: Total rows written to all canonical tables.
